title: Elan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Elan''' could refer to several individuals:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Elan Rast]]''', a [[Jedi Master]].
*'''[[Elan Sel'Sabagno|Elan Sleazebaggano]]''', a [[Balosar (species)|Balosar]] medical student.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Elan]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Priestess/Legends|Priestess]].
*'''[[Elan Sel'Sabagno/Legends|Elan Sel'Sabagno]]''', a [[Balosar (species)/Legends|Balosar]] medical student.
*'''[[Yoshi Raph-Elan]]''', a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].
*[[Elan (Galacian)|'''Elan''']], the leader of the Hill People of [[Gala]].
*"'''Elan Mak'''", an alias used by the [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Kam Nale]]

==Non-canon==
*[[Elan (Lurmen)|'''Elan''']], the [[Marriage|wife]] of a [[Qalydon]] [[Lurmen]] [[Unidentified Lurmen village|village's]] [[Biz|chief]].
{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Elan
}}
